sections.paragraph:
αὐερύω

to draw back or backwards, Il.; to draw the bow, Il.: absol., in a sacrifice, to draw the victim's head back, so as to cut its throat, Il.


Etym. It can hardly be a compd. of αὖ ἐρύω, for αὖ is never elsewh. used in the local sense of back: perh. for ἀνερύω, i. e. ἀνϜερύω.
